Description: Optimized measurements for the Avalonia v12 Windows head after the lazy-initialization pass and max-intensity benchmark implementation. Standard and max-intensity numbers are from the final runs.
Notes: LibVLC is now initialized lazily via ILibVlcProvider; startup services no longer force-load it.
OCR engine creation is deferred until the first timer tick, scheduled ~10 s after service start.
Session effect services are resolved lazily by AvaloniaSessionEffectOrchestrator.
GIF frames are decoded off the UI thread and only blitted/invalidated on the UI thread.
Flash-image windows use AvaloniaAnimatedGif for animated GIFs.
Added Windows app.manifest so overlay/video windows get proper transparency and native control host support.
Added --max-benchmark: 3-minute all-modules stress test measuring FPS, CPU, and peak memory.
